title: Kinetic Type Studio
description: Animate text in 5 physics-driven modes — Wave, Scatter, Orbit, Rain, Pulse — with live font controls and PNG export.
concept: A canvas-based kinetic typography playground where any text you type comes alive through five distinct animation modes. Each letter is an independent physics object with velocity, rotation, and scale. Wave ripples them like liquid; Scatter explodes and reassembles; Orbit sends them circling; Rain cycles letters through a falling-and-settling arc; Pulse staggers them in a rhythmic bounce chain.
features: 5 animation modes: Wave, Scatter, Orbit, Rain, Pulse
Type any custom text (up to 32 chars)
Live controls: font size, weight, letter-spacing, speed
Click/tap canvas or Trigger button to fire effects
Export current frame as hi-res PNG
Shareable URL with full state in hash

interaction.click: mode buttons, palette dots, sliders, action buttons
interaction.keyboard: type in the text input to change text
